title: wanted to use this project for my docker images
body: I am new to all of this and learning about images and containers in Docker.

comments.body: Welcome!  Are you sure about opening this pull request?  I am closing it for now as it does nothing.

learning curve. Thank you for your time, hopefully, I will be more in tune
as I get more familiar with the program. JD
